title: Aggregate Functions
description: Fungsi agregat dan GROUP BY di MySQL.

commands.name: COUNT-SUM-AVG
commands.title: COUNT / SUM / AVG
commands.description: Fungsi agregat dasar untuk menghitung, menjumlahkan, dan rata-rata.

commands.name: MIN-MAX
commands.title: MIN / MAX

commands.name: GROUP BY
commands.title: GROUP BY
commands.syntax: SELECT kolom, AGG(kolom2) FROM tabel GROUP BY kolom [WITH ROLLUP];
commands.examples:
SELECT DATE(created_at) AS date, COUNT(*) AS orders, SUM(total) AS revenue
FROM orders
GROUP BY DATE(created_at)
ORDER BY date DESC;

SELECT category, COUNT(*) AS total, AVG(price) AS avg_price
FROM products
GROUP BY category
WITH ROLLUP;

commands.name: HAVING
commands.title: HAVING
commands.description: Filter pada hasil agregat (WHERE untuk GROUP BY).
commands.syntax: SELECT ... GROUP BY kolom HAVING kondisi_agregat;
commands.examples:
SELECT user_id, COUNT(*) AS order_count, SUM(total) AS total_spent
FROM orders
GROUP BY user_id
HAVING order_count >= 5 AND total_spent > 1000000;
commands.notes: WHERE filter baris SEBELUM aggregation, HAVING filter SETELAH aggregation.

commands.name: GROUP_CONCAT
commands.title: GROUP_CONCAT
commands.description: Menggabungkan nilai dari grup menjadi satu string.
commands.notes: Default max length 1024. Ubah dengan: SET SESSION group_concat_max_len = 100000;
